title: OpenRouter Integrates Speech Transcription into the Same API: One Key to Handle Chatting and Transcription. Whisper and Token-Based STT Are Both Integrated
excerpt: Developers working on speech transcription have long been troubled by a sense of fragmentation: chat with OpenRouter, but transcribe with another Whisper server
content_html:
Developers working on speech transcription have long been troubled by a sense of fragmentation: chat with OpenRouter, but transcribe with another Whisper server, or integrate with a third-party SDK for audio-to-text. On July 22, OpenRouter smoothed this gap — it launched the POST /api/v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint on its platform, allowing users to send base64-encoded audio with the same Bearer key used for Chat Completions and receive a JSON response containing the transcribed text and usage details. Chat and transcription now share one ticket.

The core of this convenience is reuse. You don't need a new SDK or separate service, as the transcription feature runs on the same platform as chat traffic, with models from multiple providers automatically load balancing between each other rather than being locked into a single vendor. For teams that already use OpenRouter as their main platform, this integration means fewer maintenance steps and fewer keys to remember.

On the model side, OpenRouter offers two approaches. One is Whisper-like models such as openai/whisper-1, billed by audio duration, i.e., per second; the other is newer speech-to-text (STT) models, billed by tokens. It's worth noting that STT model IDs won't appear in the default /api/v1/models directory, as they belong to an output modality requiring active filtering — through the ?output_modalities=transcription parameter, you can filter out these models and their current pricing. If you want to try before integrating, the OpenRouter Playground also allows direct file upload and transcription within the browser.

The call method is simple enough to close the loop in one request. Encode the file in base64, POST it along with the model and format, then read the text and usage fields from the response. The data field takes raw base64 bytes, not a data: URI, so don't add the data:audio/mp3;base64 prefix; the format field is required to tell the upstream model how to decode these bytes. If you already have a client written for OpenAI's /v1/audio/transcriptions, simply point the base URL to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 to use it directly with zero changes. The endpoint also accepts OpenAI-style multipart/form-data uploads, with files and models, up to a 25MB limit.

Regarding field specifications, model, input_audio.data, and input_audio.format are required fields. The format can be one of wav, mp3, flac, m4a, ogg, webm, or aac; language is an ISO-639-1 language code, which will be detected automatically if omitted; temperature controls sampling, with values ranging from 0 to 1; response_format defaults to json, and setting it to verbose_json gives additional information about the task, language, duration, and segment timestamps. With timestamp_granularities set to word, you can even get word-level timestamps. However, these features are only available on providers compatible with OpenAI, such as OpenAI, Groq, and Together, while other providers will return a 400 error directly. The provider block is used to pass through each provider's private parameters, for example, Groq can pass expected vocabulary via provider.options.groq.prompt to help the model correctly handle proper nouns, avoiding mispronouncing technical terms.

The response is a JSON object, with the text string containing the transcription result, and the usage object allowing costs to be measured by request rather than estimated. In an example, a 9.2-second audio produced 113 tokens, 83 inputs, and 30 outputs, with a cost of $0.000508 — this number comes from the document example, not an actual quote, and the real cost depends on the selected model and audio length. The response header also includes an X-Generation-Id, which helps you record and track a specific request.

The routing logic follows the same system as chat. When a transcription model is hosted by multiple providers, OpenRouter performs load balancing based on price, distributing requests among them to avoid being tied to a single vendor. However, the transcription endpoint currently does not support route control per request. Fields like order, only, allow_fallbacks, data_collection, and sort, familiar in chat calls, do not work here. The provider block only carries provider-specific options. OpenRouter explicitly does not mark up provider pricing, and the listed price is your actual payment price. The zero-fallback insurance means that failed transcriptions will not be charged; if you have your own provider agreement, the BYOK feature allows using your own keys for routing, paying only the platform fee and eliminating the variable model cost. Additionally, the platform fee for the first 1 million requests per month is waived under the variable billing model.

Before actually building, there are four constraints that must be considered in the architecture. First, a 60-second upstream timeout — this refers to processing time, not audio length, so large or uncompressed recordings may time out; long audio should be split into segments and the text concatenated. Second, audio URLs are not supported; the endpoint only accepts base64 JSON or OpenAI-style multipart files not exceeding 25MB. Third, SRT/VTT format outputs are not supported; srt, vtt, and text will be rejected with a 400 error, and timestamps can only be obtained via verbose_json, with subtitles needing to be manually assembled using timestamps. Fourth, format support varies by provider, with wav being the most compatible safe default, while compressed formats like mp3 can generate smaller and faster payloads. A recording lasting several hours, like a night-long gaming session, cannot be handled in a single call and must be processed in chunks.

Finally, putting transcription in the right place. When you just need to convert audio into text, use /audio/transcriptions; when you want the model to reason about the audio content, such as sentiment analysis of customer service calls, answering questions about audio, or combining audio with other modalities in the same prompt, use the input_audio content type in /chat/completions. Text-to-speech is a third independent endpoint. OpenRouter's comparison is straightforward: for a transcription, go to the transcription endpoint to get JSON text and usage; for a model that understands audio, go to chat completion to get a single conversation result. With one key covering both conversations and sound, the barrier for implementing voice capabilities in applications has been quietly lowered again.

blocks.html_en: Developers working on speech transcription have long been troubled by a sense of fragmentation: chat with OpenRouter, but transcribe with another Whisper server, or integrate with a third-party SDK for audio-to-text. On July 22, OpenRouter smoothed this gap — it launched the POST /api/v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint on its platform, allowing users to send base64-encoded audio with the same Bearer key used for Chat Completions and receive a JSON response containing the transcribed text and usage details. Chat and transcription now share one ticket.

sentences.en: Developers working on speech transcription have long been troubled by a sense of fragmentation: chat with OpenRouter, but transcribe with another Whisper server, or integrate with a third-party SDK for audio-to-text.
sentences.zh: 从事语音转录的开发人员长期以来一直受到碎片化的困扰：使用 OpenRouter 聊天，但使用另一个 Whisper 服务器进行转录，或者与第三方 SDK 集成以实现音频转文本。

sentences.en: On July 22, OpenRouter smoothed this gap — it launched the POST /api/v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint on its platform, allowing users to send base64-encoded audio with the same Bearer key used for Chat Completions and receive a JSON response containing the transcribed text and usage details.
sentences.zh: 7 月 22 日，OpenRouter 弥补了这一差距——它在其平台上推出了 POST /api/v1/audio/transcriptions 端点，允许用户使用用于聊天完成的相同承载密钥发送 Base64 编码的音频，并接收包含转录文本和使用详细信息的 JSON 响应。

sentences.en: Chat and transcription now share one ticket.
sentences.zh: 聊天和转录现在共享一张票。

blocks.html_en: The core of this convenience is reuse. You don't need a new SDK or separate service, as the transcription feature runs on the same platform as chat traffic, with models from multiple providers automatically load balancing between each other rather than being locked into a single vendor. For teams that already use OpenRouter as their main platform, this integration means fewer maintenance steps and fewer keys to remember.

sentences.en: The core of this convenience is reuse.
sentences.zh: 这种便利的核心是重用。

sentences.en: You don't need a new SDK or separate service, as the transcription feature runs on the same platform as chat traffic, with models from multiple providers automatically load balancing between each other rather than being locked into a single vendor.
sentences.zh: 您不需要新的 SDK 或单独的服务，因为转录功能与聊天流量在同一平台上运行，来自多个提供商的模型会自动在彼此之间进行负载平衡，而不是被锁定到单个供应商。

sentences.en: For teams that already use OpenRouter as their main platform, this integration means fewer maintenance steps and fewer keys to remember.
sentences.zh: 对于已经使用 OpenRouter 作为主要平台的团队来说，这种集成意味着更少的维护步骤和需要记住的密钥。

blocks.html_en: On the model side, OpenRouter offers two approaches. One is Whisper-like models such as openai/whisper-1, billed by audio duration, i.e., per second; the other is newer speech-to-text (STT) models, billed by tokens. It's worth noting that STT model IDs won't appear in the default /api/v1/models directory, as they belong to an output modality requiring active filtering — through the ?output_modalities=transcription parameter, you can filter out these models and their current pricing. If you want to try before integrating, the OpenRouter Playground also allows direct file upload and transcription within the browser.

sentences.en: On the model side, OpenRouter offers two approaches.
sentences.zh: 在模型方面，OpenRouter 提供了两种方法。

sentences.en: One is Whisper-like models such as openai/whisper-1, billed by audio duration, i.e., per second; the other is newer speech-to-text (STT) models, billed by tokens.
sentences.zh: 一种是类似 Whisper 的模型，例如 openai/whisper-1，按音频时长（即每秒）计费；另一种是较新的语音到文本（STT）模型，按代币计费。

sentences.en: It's worth noting that STT model IDs won't appear in the default /api/v1/models directory, as they belong to an output modality requiring active filtering — through the ?output_modalities=transcription parameter, you can filter out these models and their current pricing.
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，STT 模型 ID 不会出现在默认的 /api/v1/models 目录中，因为它们属于需要主动过滤的输出模式 - 通过 ?output_modalities=transcription 参数，您可以过滤掉这些模型及其当前定价。

sentences.en: If you want to try before integrating, the OpenRouter Playground also allows direct file upload and transcription within the browser.
sentences.zh: 如果您想在集成之前尝试，OpenRouter Playground 还允许在浏览器中直接上传文件和转录。

Encode the file in base64, POST it along with the model and format, then read the text and usage fields from the response. sentences.en: The call method is simple enough to close the loop in one request.
sentences.zh: 调用方法很简单，可以在一个请求中关闭循环。

sentences.en: Encode the file in base64, POST it along with the model and format, then read the text and usage fields from the response.
sentences.zh: 使用 base64 对文件进行编码，将其与模型和格式一起 POST，然后从响应中读取文本和使用字段。

sentences.en: The data field takes raw base64 bytes, not a data: URI, so don't add the data:audio/mp3;base64 prefix; the format field is required to tell the upstream model how to decode these bytes.
sentences.zh: 数据字段采用原始 base64 字节，而不是 data: URI，因此不要添加 data:audio/mp3;base64 前缀;需要格式字段来告诉上游模型如何解码这些字节。

sentences.en: If you already have a client written for OpenAI's /v1/audio/transcriptions, simply point the base URL to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 to use it directly with zero changes.
sentences.zh: 如果您已经有为 OpenAI 的 /v1/audio/transcriptions 编写的客户端，只需将基本 URL 指向 https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 即可直接使用它，零更改。

sentences.en: The endpoint also accepts OpenAI-style multipart/form-data uploads, with files and models, up to a 25MB limit.
sentences.zh: 该端点还接受 OpenAI 风格的多部分/表单数据上传，包括文件和模型，上限为 25MB。

The provider block is used to pass through each provider's private parameters, for example, Groq can pass expected vocabulary via provider.options.groq.prompt to help the model correctly handle proper nouns, avoiding mispronouncing technical terms.

sentences.en: Regarding field specifications, model, input_audio.data, and input_audio.format are required fields.
sentences.zh: 关于字段规范，model、input_audio.data和input_audio.format是必填字段。

sentences.en: The format can be one of wav, mp3, flac, m4a, ogg, webm, or aac; language is an ISO-639-1 language code, which will be detected automatically if omitted; temperature controls sampling, with values ranging from 0 to 1; response_format defaults to json, and setting it to verbose_json gives additional information about the task, language, duration, and segment timestamps.
sentences.zh: 格式可以是 wav、mp3、flac、m4a、ogg、webm 或 aac 之一； language为ISO-639-1语言代码，省略则自动检测；温度控制采样，取值范围0~1； response_format 默认为 json，将其设置为 verbose_json 可提供有关任务、语言、持续时间和分段时间戳的附加信息。

sentences.en: With timestamp_granularities set to word, you can even get word-level timestamps.
sentences.zh: 将时间戳_粒度设置为单词时，您甚至可以获得单词级别的时间戳。

sentences.en: However, these features are only available on providers compatible with OpenAI, such as OpenAI, Groq, and Together, while other providers will return a 400 error directly.
sentences.zh: 不过，这些功能仅在兼容 OpenAI 的提供商上可用，例如 OpenAI、Groq 和 Together，而其他提供商将直接返回 400 错误。

sentences.en: The provider block is used to pass through each provider's private parameters, for example, Groq can pass expected vocabulary via provider.options.groq.prompt to help the model correctly handle proper nouns, avoiding mispronouncing technical terms.
sentences.zh: provider块用于传递每个provider的私有参数，例如，Groq可以通过provider.options.groq.prompt传递预期词汇，帮助模型正确处理专有名词，避免读错技术术语。

blocks.html_en: The response is a JSON object, with the text string containing the transcription result, and the usage object allowing costs to be measured by request rather than estimated. In an example, a 9.2-second audio produced 113 tokens, 83 inputs, and 30 outputs, with a cost of $0.000508 — this number comes from the document example, not an actual quote, and the real cost depends on the selected model and audio length. The response header also includes an X-Generation-Id, which helps you record and track a specific request.

sentences.en: The response is a JSON object, with the text string containing the transcription result, and the usage object allowing costs to be measured by request rather than estimated.
sentences.zh: 响应是一个 JSON 对象，其中文本字符串包含转录结果，而使用对象允许通过请求来衡量成本而不是估计成本。

sentences.en: In an example, a 9.2-second audio produced 113 tokens, 83 inputs, and 30 outputs, with a cost of $0.000508 — this number comes from the document example, not an actual quote, and the real cost depends on the selected model and audio length.
sentences.zh: 在一个示例中，一段 9.2 秒的音频产生了 113 个令牌、83 个输入和 30 个输出，成本为 0.000508 美元——这个数字来自文档示例，而不是实际报价，实际成本取决于所选的模型和音频长度。

sentences.en: The response header also includes an X-Generation-Id, which helps you record and track a specific request.
sentences.zh: 响应标头还包含 X-Generation-Id，可帮助您记录和跟踪特定请求。

sentences.en: The routing logic follows the same system as chat.
sentences.zh: 路由逻辑遵循与聊天相同的系统。

sentences.en: When a transcription model is hosted by multiple providers, OpenRouter performs load balancing based on price, distributing requests among them to avoid being tied to a single vendor.
sentences.zh: 当转录模型由多个提供商托管时，OpenRouter 根据价格执行负载平衡，在它们之间分配请求以避免与单个供应商绑定。

sentences.en: However, the transcription endpoint currently does not support route control per request.
sentences.zh: 但是，转录端点当前不支持每个请求的路由控制。

sentences.en: Fields like order, only, allow_fallbacks, data_collection, and sort, familiar in chat calls, do not work here.
sentences.zh: order、only、allow_fallbacks、data_collection 和 sort 等聊天调用中常见的字段在这里不起作用。

sentences.en: The provider block only carries provider-specific options.
sentences.zh: 提供者块仅携带提供者特定的选项。

sentences.en: OpenRouter explicitly does not mark up provider pricing, and the listed price is your actual payment price.
sentences.zh: OpenRouter 明确不标明提供商定价，列出的价格是您的实际付款价格。

sentences.en: The zero-fallback insurance means that failed transcriptions will not be charged; if you have your own provider agreement, the BYOK feature allows using your own keys for routing, paying only the platform fee and eliminating the variable model cost.
sentences.zh: 零回退保险意味着转录失败不会收取费用；如果您有自己的提供商协议，BYOK 功能允许使用您自己的密钥进行路由，只需支付平台费用并消除可变模型成本。

sentences.en: Additionally, the platform fee for the first 1 million requests per month is waived under the variable billing model.
sentences.zh: 此外，在可变计费模式下，每月前 100 万个请求的平台费用将被免除。

sentences.en: Before actually building, there are four constraints that must be considered in the architecture.
sentences.zh: 在实际构建之前，架构中必须考虑四个约束。

sentences.en: First, a 60-second upstream timeout — this refers to processing time, not audio length, so large or uncompressed recordings may time out; long audio should be split into segments and the text concatenated.
sentences.zh: 首先，60秒的上行超时——这是指处理时间，而不是音频长度，因此大的或未压缩的录音可能会超时；长音频应分成片段并连接文本。

sentences.en: Second, audio URLs are not supported; the endpoint only accepts base64 JSON or OpenAI-style multipart files not exceeding 25MB.
sentences.zh: 其次，不支持音频URL；端点仅接受不超过 25MB 的 base64 JSON 或 OpenAI 样式的多部分文件。

sentences.en: Third, SRT/VTT format outputs are not supported; srt, vtt, and text will be rejected with a 400 error, and timestamps can only be obtained via verbose_json, with subtitles needing to be manually assembled using timestamps.
sentences.zh: 三、不支持SRT/VTT格式输出； srt、vtt、text会被拒绝并返回400错误，时间戳只能通过verbose_json获取，字幕需要使用时间戳手动组装。

sentences.en: Fourth, format support varies by provider, with wav being the most compatible safe default, while compressed formats like mp3 can generate smaller and faster payloads.
sentences.zh: 第四，格式支持因提供商而异，wav 是最兼容的安全默认值，而 mp3 等压缩格式可以生成更小、更快的有效负载。

sentences.en: A recording lasting several hours, like a night-long gaming session, cannot be handled in a single call and must be processed in chunks.
sentences.zh: 持续几个小时的录音（例如通宵游戏）无法在一次调用中处理，必须分块处理。

blocks.html_en: Finally, putting transcription in the right place. When you just need to convert audio into text, use /audio/transcriptions; when you want the model to reason about the audio content, such as sentiment analysis of customer service calls, answering questions about audio, or combining audio with other modalities in the same prompt, use the input_audio content type in /chat/completions. Text-to-speech is a third independent endpoint. OpenRouter's comparison is straightforward: for a transcription, go to the transcription endpoint to get JSON text and usage; for a model that understands audio, go to chat completion to get a single conversation result. With one key covering both conversations and sound, the barrier for implementing voice capabilities in applications has been quietly lowered again.

sentences.en: Finally, putting transcription in the right place.
sentences.zh: 最后，将转录放在正确的位置。

sentences.en: When you just need to convert audio into text, use /audio/transcriptions; when you want the model to reason about the audio content, such as sentiment analysis of customer service calls, answering questions about audio, or combining audio with other modalities in the same prompt, use the input_audio content type in /chat/completions.
sentences.zh: 当您只需要将音频转换为文本时，请使用/audio/transcriptions；当您希望模型对音频内容进行推理（例如客户服务呼叫的情绪分析、回答有关音频的问题或在同一提示中将音频与其他模式相结合）时，请使用 /chat/completions 中的 input_audio 内容类型。

sentences.en: Text-to-speech is a third independent endpoint.
sentences.zh: 文本转语音是第三个独立端点。

sentences.en: OpenRouter's comparison is straightforward: for a transcription, go to the transcription endpoint to get JSON text and usage; for a model that understands audio, go to chat completion to get a single conversation result.
sentences.zh: OpenRouter 的比较很简单：对于转录，转到转录端点以获取 JSON 文本和用法；对于理解音频的模型，请转到聊天完成以获得单个对话结果。

sentences.en: With one key covering both conversations and sound, the barrier for implementing voice capabilities in applications has been quietly lowered again.
sentences.zh: 一键兼顾对话和声音，应用中实现语音能力的门槛再次悄然降低。

content_html_zh:
从事语音转录的开发人员长期以来一直受到碎片化的困扰：使用 OpenRouter 聊天，但使用另一个 Whisper 服务器进行转录，或者与第三方 SDK 集成以实现音频转文本。 7 月 22 日，OpenRouter 弥补了这一差距——它在其平台上推出了 POST /api/v1/audio/transcriptions 端点，允许用户使用用于聊天完成的相同承载密钥发送 Base64 编码的音频，并接收包含转录文本和使用详细信息的 JSON 响应。 聊天和转录现在共享一张票。

这种便利的核心是重用。 您不需要新的 SDK 或单独的服务，因为转录功能与聊天流量在同一平台上运行，来自多个提供商的模型会自动在彼此之间进行负载平衡，而不是被锁定到单个供应商。 对于已经使用 OpenRouter 作为主要平台的团队来说，这种集成意味着更少的维护步骤和需要记住的密钥。

在模型方面，OpenRouter 提供了两种方法。 一种是类似 Whisper 的模型，例如 openai/whisper-1，按音频时长（即每秒）计费；另一种是较新的语音到文本（STT）模型，按代币计费。 值得注意的是，STT 模型 ID 不会出现在默认的 /api/v1/models 目录中，因为它们属于需要主动过滤的输出模式 - 通过 ?output_modalities=transcription 参数，您可以过滤掉这些模型及其当前定价。 如果您想在集成之前尝试，OpenRouter Playground 还允许在浏览器中直接上传文件和转录。

调用方法很简单，可以在一个请求中关闭循环。 使用 base64 对文件进行编码，将其与模型和格式一起 POST，然后从响应中读取文本和使用字段。 数据字段采用原始 base64 字节，而不是 data: URI，因此不要添加 data:audio/mp3;base64 前缀;需要格式字段来告诉上游模型如何解码这些字节。 如果您已经有为 OpenAI 的 /v1/audio/transcriptions 编写的客户端，只需将基本 URL 指向 https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 即可直接使用它，零更改。 该端点还接受 OpenAI 风格的多部分/表单数据上传，包括文件和模型，上限为 25MB。

关于字段规范，model、input_audio.data和input_audio.format是必填字段。 格式可以是 wav、mp3、flac、m4a、ogg、webm 或 aac 之一； language为ISO-639-1语言代码，省略则自动检测；温度控制采样，取值范围0~1； response_format 默认为 json，将其设置为 verbose_json 可提供有关任务、语言、持续时间和分段时间戳的附加信息。 将时间戳_粒度设置为单词时，您甚至可以获得单词级别的时间戳。 不过，这些功能仅在兼容 OpenAI 的提供商上可用，例如 OpenAI、Groq 和 Together，而其他提供商将直接返回 400 错误。 provider块用于传递每个provider的私有参数，例如，Groq可以通过provider.options.groq.prompt传递预期词汇，帮助模型正确处理专有名词，避免读错技术术语。

响应是一个 JSON 对象，其中文本字符串包含转录结果，而使用对象允许通过请求来衡量成本而不是估计成本。 在一个示例中，一段 9.2 秒的音频产生了 113 个令牌、83 个输入和 30 个输出，成本为 0.000508 美元——这个数字来自文档示例，而不是实际报价，实际成本取决于所选的模型和音频长度。 响应标头还包含 X-Generation-Id，可帮助您记录和跟踪特定请求。

路由逻辑遵循与聊天相同的系统。 当转录模型由多个提供商托管时，OpenRouter 根据价格执行负载平衡，在它们之间分配请求以避免与单个供应商绑定。 但是，转录端点当前不支持每个请求的路由控制。 order、only、allow_fallbacks、data_collection 和 sort 等聊天调用中常见的字段在这里不起作用。 提供者块仅携带提供者特定的选项。 OpenRouter 明确不标明提供商定价，列出的价格是您的实际付款价格。 零回退保险意味着转录失败不会收取费用；如果您有自己的提供商协议，BYOK 功能允许使用您自己的密钥进行路由，只需支付平台费用并消除可变模型成本。 此外，在可变计费模式下，每月前 100 万个请求的平台费用将被免除。

在实际构建之前，架构中必须考虑四个约束。 首先，60秒的上行超时——这是指处理时间，而不是音频长度，因此大的或未压缩的录音可能会超时；长音频应分成片段并连接文本。 其次，不支持音频URL；端点仅接受不超过 25MB 的 base64 JSON 或 OpenAI 样式的多部分文件。 三、不支持SRT/VTT格式输出； srt、vtt、text会被拒绝并返回400错误，时间戳只能通过verbose_json获取，字幕需要使用时间戳手动组装。 第四，格式支持因提供商而异，wav 是最兼容的安全默认值，而 mp3 等压缩格式可以生成更小、更快的有效负载。 持续几个小时的录音（例如通宵游戏）无法在一次调用中处理，必须分块处理。

最后，将转录放在正确的位置。 当您只需要将音频转换为文本时，请使用/audio/transcriptions；当您希望模型对音频内容进行推理（例如客户服务呼叫的情绪分析、回答有关音频的问题或在同一提示中将音频与其他模式相结合）时，请使用 /chat/completions 中的 input_audio 内容类型。 文本转语音是第三个独立端点。 OpenRouter 的比较很简单：对于转录，转到转录端点以获取 JSON 文本和用法；对于理解音频的模型，请转到聊天完成以获得单个对话结果。 一键兼顾对话和声音，应用中实现语音能力的门槛再次悄然降低。
